name: Caramel Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Soymilk (must be the full-fat kind, or use cream)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar and water in a pan before adding heat.
2. Stir over medium flame until it begins to brown.
3. Add cinnamon and soymilk.
4. Remove from heat and stir well.
5. If things harden, return to heat and let it melt thoroughly.
6. This is actually better over cooked brown rice than it is over bread pudding.
